problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mycorrhizal. Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
